name: Hideko
short_description: A short mystery game about nature. ☀️☁️🍃 Explore the rules of a small sandbox world 🔎 Combine elements to create new forms of life! ❤️
detailed_description:
Hideko is a short mystery game about nature. ☀️☁️🍃

Explore the rules of a small sandbox world to create new objects, plants and other forms of life! Discover special situations and interactions to earn stars to increase your inventory-size and unlock new areas. 

Features

  • Dynamic physics system to play with ⚾

  • Find many different forms of life 🐌

  • 50 items to discover 🔎

  • 20 stars to collect 🌟

  • Around 1-2 hours of playtime ⏱️

Music and Sound Design by jaco "bbtombo"!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Indonesian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
